                      type: "text",
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                      name: "seminar[title]",
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                      id: "seminar_title",
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                      value: seminar.title,
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

                      required: true,
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

                      class: input_classes(seminar.errors[:title].present?),
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                      placeholder: "e.g., Guard Passing Fundamentals with John Doe"
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

                    )
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            

            

                    render_field_errors(seminar.errors[:title])
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

                  end
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                  
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

                  div do
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            

            

                    label(for: "seminar_description", class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Description" }
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

                    textarea(
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                      name: "seminar[description]",
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                      id: "seminar_description",
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                      rows: 4,
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

                      class: input_classes(seminar.errors[:description].present?),
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            

            

                      placeholder: "Describe what will be covered in the seminar..."
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                    ) { seminar.description }
          
      92. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    92.

      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            

            

                  end
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94.

              def datetime_section(form)
          
      98. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    98. 
            

            

                div(class: "space-y-4") do
          
      99. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    99. 
            

            

                  h2(class: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900") { "Date & Time" }
          
      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

                  
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                  div do
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            

            

                    label(for: "seminar_starts_at", class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Start Date & Time *" }
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103. 
            

            

                    input(
          
      104.

      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

                      name: "seminar[starts_at]",
          
      106. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    106. 
            

            

                      id: "seminar_starts_at",
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107. 
            

            

                      value: seminar.starts_at&.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M"),
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                      required: true,
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

                      class: input_classes(seminar.errors[:starts_at].present?)
          
      110. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    110. 
            

            

                    )
          
      111. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    111. 
            

            

                    render_field_errors(seminar.errors[:starts_at])
          
      112. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    112. 
            

            

                  end
          
      113. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    113. 
            

            

                end
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            

            

              end
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            

            

            
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

              def location_section(form)
          
      117.

                div(class: "space-y-4") do

                  h2(class: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900") { "Location" }
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

                  
          
      120.

                  div do
          
      121.

                    label(for: "seminar_address", class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Address" }

                    input(
          
      123.

                      type: "text",
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            

            

                      name: "seminar[address]",
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

                      id: "seminar_address",

                    )

              def images_section(form)
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            

            

                div(class: "space-y-4") do
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            

                  h2(class: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900") { "Images" }
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            

            

                  
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            

                  div("data-controller": "image-upload") do
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

                    label(for: "seminar_images", class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Seminar Images" }
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            

                    input(
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            

                      type: "file",
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

                      name: "seminar[images][]",
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            

                      id: "seminar_images",
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

                      multiple: true,
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

                      accept: "image/jpeg,image/jpg,image/png,image/webp",
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                      class: input_classes(seminar.errors[:images].present?),
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                      "data-image-upload-target": "input"
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                    )
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                    render_field_errors(seminar.errors[:images])
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            

                    p(class: "mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500") { "Upload up to 10 images (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Maximum 5MB per image." }
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                    
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                    # Show existing images for edit
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                    if seminar.persisted? && seminar.has_images?
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                      div(class: "mt-4") do
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

                        h3(class: "text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Current Images" }
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                        div(class: "grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3") do
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                          seminar.images.each do |image|
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                            div(class: "relative") do
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                              img(
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

                                src: rails_blob_url(image.variant(:thumb)),
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

                                alt: "Seminar image",
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                                class: "w-full h-24 object-cover rounded-md"
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

                              )
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                            end
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

                          end
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

                        end
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                      end
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                    end
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                  end
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                end
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

              end
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

            
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

              def instructors_section(form)
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                div(class: "space-y-4") do
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

                  h2(class: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900") { "Instructors" }
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

                  
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

                  div do
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                    label(class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Select Instructors" }
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                    div(class: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto border border-gray-300 rounded-md p-3") do
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                      players.each do |player|
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                        div(class: "flex items-center") do
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                          input(
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                            type: "checkbox",
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                            name: "seminar[player_ids][]",
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                            id: "player_#{player.id}",
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                            value: player.id,
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                            checked: seminar.players.include?(player),
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

                            class: "h-4 w-4 text-indigo-600 focus:ring-indigo-500 border-gray-300 rounded"
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                          )
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                          label(
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                            for: "player_#{player.id}",
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                            class: "ml-2 block text-sm text-gray-900"
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                          ) do
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                            "#{player.name} (#{player.team.name})"
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                          end
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                        end
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                      end
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                    end
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                    p(class: "mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500") { "Select the instructors who will be teaching this seminar" }
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                  end
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                end
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

              end
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

            
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

              def additional_info_section(form)
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

                div(class: "space-y-4") do
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                  h2(class: "text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900") { "Additional Information" }
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                  
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

                  div(class: "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4") do
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                    div do
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                      label(for: "seminar_price", class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Price ($)" }
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                      input(
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                        type: "number",
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                        name: "seminar[price]",
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                        id: "seminar_price",
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                        value: seminar.price,
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                        min: 0,
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                        step: 0.01,
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                        class: input_classes(seminar.errors[:price].present?),
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

                        placeholder: "0.00"
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                      )
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

                      render_field_errors(seminar.errors[:price])
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

                    end
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                    
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                    div do
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                      label(for: "seminar_max_participants", class: "block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2") { "Max Participants" }
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                      input(
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                        type: "number",
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                        name: "seminar[max_participants]",
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                        id: "seminar_max_participants",
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                        value: seminar.max_participants,
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            

                        min: 1,
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            

                        class: input_classes(seminar.errors[:max_participants].present?),
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            

                        placeholder: "Leave blank for unlimited"
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                      )
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                      render_field_errors(seminar.errors[:max_participants])
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                    end
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            

                  end
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            

                end
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

              end
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            

            

            
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

              def form_actions(form)
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            

                div(class: "flex justify-end space-x-3 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200") do
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

                  render UI::Button.new(
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            

                    href: seminar.persisted? ? seminar_path(seminar) : seminars_path,
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            

                    variant: "secondary"
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

                  ) do
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            

                    "Cancel"
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                  end
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

                  
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                  render UI::Button.new(
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            

                    type: "submit",
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            

                    variant: "primary"
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                  ) do
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            

                    seminar.persisted? ? "Update Seminar" : "Create Seminar"
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

                  end
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

                end
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

              end
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            

            
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            

              def render_errors
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            

                div(class: "rounded-md bg-red-50 p-4 mb-6") do
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            

                  div(class: "flex") do
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            

                    div(class: "ml-3") do
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            

                      h3(class: "text-sm font-medium text-red-800") do
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            

                        "Please fix the following errors:"
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            

                      end
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            

                      div(class: "mt-2 text-sm text-red-700") do
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            

                        ul(class: "list-disc pl-5 space-y-1") do
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            

                          seminar.errors.full_messages.each do |message|
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            

            

                            li { message }
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            

            

                          end
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            

            

                        end
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            

            

                      end
          
      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            

            

                    end
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            

            

                  end
          
      277.

      78.
